reasons: Recipe drives real Command Center UI navigation and presses through CDP.
Trace evidence covers default, selected, and disabled passive observation policies.
Screenshots were visually inspected and show the claimed before/after UI surfaces.
better_version_guidance: A native full-run recorder should replace the screenshot-derived MP4 when capture-helper or CDP screencast is reliable in the sandbox.

coverage.reason: Every acceptance criterion is mapped in recipe-coverage.md.

evidence.reason: Recipe screenshots and trace are strong; video is screenshot-derived because both live recorders failed in this sandbox.

flow.reason: The recipe uses manifest-declared actions and real UI interactions.

contextual_findings.message: Native capture-helper did not create the expected MP4 and CDP screencast captured zero frames; MP4 was generated from real recipe screenshots.

suggested_recipe_delta: Use a reliable full-run recorder when available so the video captures live motion instead of screenshot frames.

good_patterns: Real CDP UI navigation and presses
Trace assertions for passive observation fields
anti_patterns: Recorder fallback means video should not be treated as full live capture
